label: Rekian document type routing taxonomy
description: Minimum document-type routing taxonomy for choosing report formats, table profiles, and writing strategy before HWPX generation.

source.note: User-defined baseline categories for Rekian format selection.

routing_rule.fallback: If no registered format fits the type, perform new format extraction before generation.

entries.label: 기본계획·실행계획
entries.use_when: A proposal has moved beyond an idea and needs background, goals, strategy, tasks, timeline, budget, and implementation structure.

entries.label: 검토보고·조치의견
entries.use_when: A specific issue, proposal, complaint, pledge, or instruction must be evaluated and a practical response direction is needed.

entries.label: 행사·박람회·TF 운영계획
entries.use_when: The document organizes people, schedule, venue, roles, program, publicity, safety, budget, and operation flow.

entries.label: 선진지 견학·우수시책 벤치마킹
entries.use_when: The core evidence is external cases, visited sites, lessons learned, and adaptation to the local context.

entries.label: 캐릭터·브랜딩·홍보 전략
entries.use_when: The decision depends on audience, identity, message, media channel, visual asset, campaign design, and public recognition.

entries.label: 시책 아이디어·초기 구상
entries.use_when: The proposal is still exploratory and needs a concise problem definition, concept, expected effect, and next validation step.

entries.label: 용역계획·착수/최종보고
entries.use_when: The document defines an outsourced study or implementation contract, including scope, tasks, deliverables, schedule, budget, and reporting milestones.

entries.label: 회의자료·보고전·회의결과
entries.use_when: The document supports a meeting or decision discussion and must be concise, agenda-driven, and easy to scan.

entries.label: 현황·사례 요약
entries.use_when: The task is mainly to summarize facts, cases, counts, trends, or current conditions before a later decision document.

entries.label: 1쪽 상급자 보고
entries.use_when: A senior decision-maker needs a one-page brief with the issue, options, recommendation, risk, and requested decision.
